---
name: Feedback from your vault
about: Bug, feature request, or general feedback. Mirror of what `/feedback` would file from inside a WorkDesk vault.
title: ""
labels: ["from-vault"]

## Feedback

### What
<!-- One sentence: what's the feedback? -->

### Why
<!-- Why do you want this? -->

### Desired end state
<!-- What would be different in your vault if this shipped? -->

### Hoped-for outcome
<!-- What outcome are you hoping for? -->

### How you'd use it
<!-- How would you use this once it's there? -->

## Diagnostics

<!-- If you're filing this manually instead of via `/feedback`, fill these in by hand. -->

- **WorkDesk OS version:** <!-- from `config/VERSION` -->
- **Doctor result:** <!-- from `config/state/doctor.md` -->
- **OS:** <!-- e.g. macOS 25.4.0 -->
- **Claude Code:** <!-- output of `claude --version` -->
